# BP-100 negative: errgroup SetLimit bounds the fan-out
lang: go
file: BP-100-safe.go
---
package sample

func processAll(items []int) {
	sem := make(chan struct{}, 4)
	for _, item := range items {
		sem <- struct{}{}
		go func(item int) {
			process(item)
			<-sem
		}(item)
	}
}

func process(item int) {}
